creator: kfv@kfv.io
text:
Hey,

IRBUG is a 3 month-old active BSD User Group located in Teheran, Iran.
It is meant to be a venue for hackers and anyone interested in BSD or UNIX to come together so as to share knowledge, discuss, work, make friends and hack stuff.
We currently meet on last Thursday of the month and announcements are made on Website (currently about time only - including more information is in progress) and my Twitter account (@kfvahedi).

Website:
https://www.irbug.org

IRC Channel:
irbug on Freenode

Cheers,
Faraz
